title: Authors and Citation
text: Vincent Carey. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Carey V (2026). GOAnno4Bioc: Modular Gene Ontology Annotation Parsing Bioconductor. R package version 0.0.2, https://github.com/vjcitn/GOAnno4Bioc.
code: @Manual{,   title = {GOAnno4Bioc: Modular Gene Ontology Annotation Parsing for Bioconductor},   author = {Vincent Carey},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.2},   url = {https://github.com/vjcitn/GOAnno4Bioc}, }

what: Modular Gene Ontology Annotation Parsing for Bioconductor
title: Modular Gene Ontology Annotation Parsing for Bioconductor
text: package R (>= 4.6.0) defines Bioconductor interfaces Gene Ontology Annotation resources GO Consortium. exemplary gaf.gz file March 2026 provided inst/human parsing function, ingestGAF produces tibble annotations

title: Aspect-to-RO predicate map — GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO
text: Maps single-character GAF Aspect code (column 9) Relation Ontology predicate CURIE used semsql gene-GO annotation schema.

title: Aspect-to-RO predicate map — GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO
code: GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO

title: Aspect-to-RO predicate map — GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO
text: object class character length 3.

title: Aspect-to-RO predicate map — GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO
text: Aspect code compressed namespace indicator GAF format: P biological_process F molecular_function C cellular_component mapping RO predicates reflects distinct biological semantics namespace: P RO:0002331 (involved_in) — gene product participates biological process F RO:0002327 (enables) — gene product provides catalytic binding activity molecular function C RO:0001025 (located_in) — gene product spatially located cellular component Making predicate explicit (rather leaving implicit Aspect code) enables typed predicate filtering semsql annotation schema, queries like "genes enable descendant GO:0003824" can expressed directly rather requiring namespace pre-filter.

what: GAF 2.2 column names in order — GAF_COLUMNS
title: GAF 2.2 column names in order — GAF_COLUMNS
text: character vector 17 column names used GAF 2.2 files, defined order.  Used internally parse_gaf name columns returned tibble.

title: GAF 2.2 column names in order — GAF_COLUMNS
code: GAF_COLUMNS

title: GAF 2.2 column names in order — GAF_COLUMNS
text: object class character length 17.

title: Computational evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_COMPUTATIONAL
text: GAF evidence codes based computational analysis rather direct experiment.

title: Computational evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_COMPUTATIONAL
code: GAF_EVIDENCE_COMPUTATIONAL

title: Computational evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_COMPUTATIONAL
text: object class character length 11.

title: Experimental evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL
text: GAF evidence codes considered based direct experimental evidence, opposed computational author-inferred codes. Useful filtering high-confidence annotations.

title: Experimental evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL
code: GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL

title: Experimental evidence codes — GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL
text: object class character length 11.

what: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
title: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
text: Combines db db_object_id CURIE-style identifier "UniProtKB:P12345".  format used semsql gene_go_edge schema subject column.

title: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
code: gaf_add_subject_curie(gaf)

title: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
text: gaf additional subject_curie column prepended.

title: Extract the primary database accession as a CURIE — gaf_add_subject_curie
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf_add_subject_curie(gaf) #> # A tibble: 9 × 21 #>   subject_curie db    db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id db_reference #>   <chr>         <chr> <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr> <chr>        #> 1 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:212685… #> 2 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 #> 3 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 #> 4 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 #> 5 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 #> 6 UniProtKB:Q9… UniP… Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0… PMID:116067… #> 7 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 #> 8 UniProtKB:P0… UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 #> 9 UniProtKB:O0… UniP… O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0… PMID:9813127 #> # ℹ 14 more variables: evidence_code <chr>, with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, #> #   ro_predicate <chr>, db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, #> #   db_object_type <chr>, taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, assigned_by <chr>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>

what: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
title: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
text: Convenience cross-tabulation ontology aspect (BP/MF/CC) broad evidence category (experimental vs computational vs ).

title: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
code: gaf_aspect_summary(gaf)

title: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
text: tibble columns aspect, evidence_category, n.

title: Summarise annotation counts by aspect and evidence type — gaf_aspect_summary
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf_aspect_summary(gaf) #> # A tibble: 4 × 3 #>   aspect evidence_category     n #>   <chr>  <chr>             <int> #> 1 C      experimental          1 #> 2 F      experimental          3 #> 3 P      computational         1 #> 4 P      experimental          4

what: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
title: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
text: Downloads GAF file specified species EBI GOA FTP caches locally using BiocFileCache.  subsequent calls cached file returned without re-downloading (unless force = TRUE).

title: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
code: gaf_cache(species = NULL, url = NULL, gaf_file = NULL, force = FALSE)

title: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
text: species character scalar matching species value gaf_known_species, e.g. "human", "mouse". Case-insensitive.  Ignored url supplied. url character scalar.  fully-resolved GAF URL.  Used species NULL override static URL known species. gaf_file character scalar.  Override just filename within species FTP directory, e.g. "goa_human.gaf.gz".  Useful EBI renames standard file without changing directory. used species supplied url NULL. force logical.  Re-download even cached copy exists. Default FALSE.

title: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
text: local file path cached .gaf.gz file, suitable passing parse_gaf.

title: Retrieve and cache a GAF file via BiocFileCache — gaf_cache
code: path <- gaf_cache("human") #> Using cached GAF: /Users/vincentcarey/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/BiocFileCache/d6e436535dcd_goa_human.gaf.gz parse_gaf(path, filter_taxon = 9606L) #> # A tibble: 816,793 × 20 #>    db        db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier   go_id      db_reference   #>    <chr>     <chr>        <chr>            <chr>       <chr>      <chr>          #>  1 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0000298 GO_REF:0000033 #>  2 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0005515 PMID:33961781  #>  3 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0008486 GO_REF:0000003 #>  4 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0008486 GO_REF:0000024 #>  5 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0008486 GO_REF:0000033 #>  6 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0016462 GO_REF:0000002 #>  7 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0016787 GO_REF:0000002 #>  8 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0034431 GO_REF:0000033 #>  9 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables     GO:0034432 GO_REF:0000033 #> 10 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           involved_in GO:0071543 GO_REF:0000033 #> # ℹ 816,783 more rows #> # ℹ 14 more variables: evidence_code <chr>, with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, #> #   ro_predicate <chr>, db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, #> #   db_object_type <chr>, taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, assigned_by <chr>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>  # Override filename if EBI has renamed the file path <- gaf_cache("human", gaf_file = "goa_human.gaf.gz") #> Using cached GAF: /Users/vincentcarey/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/BiocFileCache/d6e436535dcd_goa_human.gaf.gz  # Supply a fully custom URL path <- gaf_cache(   url = paste0(     "https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/",     "HUMAN/goa_human.gaf.gz"   ) ) #> Using cached GAF: /Users/vincentcarey/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/BiocFileCache/d6e436535dcd_goa_human.gaf.gz

what: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
title: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
text: Returns summary tibble showing many annotations exist per evidence code, sorted descending count.  Useful quick quality check parsing.

title: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
code: gaf_evidence_summary(gaf)

title: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
text: tibble columns evidence_code, n, experimental (logical).

title: Summarise annotation counts by evidence code — gaf_evidence_summary
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf_evidence_summary(gaf) #> # A tibble: 4 × 3 #>   evidence_code     n experimental #>   <chr>         <int> <lgl>        #> 1 IDA               6 TRUE         #> 2 IEA               1 FALSE        #> 3 IMP               1 TRUE         #> 4 IPI               1 TRUE

what: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
title: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
text: Several GAF columns contain pipe-separated multi-value fields: db_reference, with_or_from, db_object_synonym, annotation_extension.  function unnests one column long format, one value per row columns repeated.

title: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
code: gaf_expand_column(gaf, column)

title: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf. column character scalar naming column expand.  Must one "db_reference", "with_or_from", "db_object_synonym", "annotation_extension".

title: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
text: tibble \(\geq\) many rows gaf — one per pipe-separated value column.  Rows column NA retained NA expanded column.

title: Expand a pipe-separated GAF column into long format — gaf_expand_column
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path)  # db_reference has pipe-separated PMIDs in some rows gaf_expand_column(gaf, "db_reference") #> # A tibble: 11 × 20 #>    db        db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id      db_reference  #>    <chr>     <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr>      <chr>         #>  1 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0006954 PMID:2126852  #>  2 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0006954 PMID:9843981  #>  3 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0005125 PMID:2126852  #>  4 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0005615 PMID:2126852  #>  5 UniProtKB P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0006954 PMID:3877632  #>  6 UniProtKB P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0005102 PMID:3877632  #>  7 UniProtKB Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0045087 PMID:11606775 #>  8 UniProtKB Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0045087 PMID:15240741 #>  9 UniProtKB P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0006977 PMID:3460971  #> 10 UniProtKB P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0003700 PMID:3460971  #> 11 UniProtKB O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0045087 PMID:9813127  #> # ℹ 14 more variables: evidence_code <chr>, with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, #> #   ro_predicate <chr>, db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, #> #   db_object_type <chr>, taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, assigned_by <chr>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>  # with_or_from has pipe-separated IDs in some rows gaf_expand_column(gaf, "with_or_from") #> # A tibble: 10 × 20 #>    db        db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id      db_reference     #>    <chr>     <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr>      <chr>            #>  1 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0006954 PMID:2126852|PM… #>  2 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0005125 PMID:2126852     #>  3 UniProtKB P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0005615 PMID:2126852     #>  4 UniProtKB P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0006954 PMID:3877632     #>  5 UniProtKB P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0005102 PMID:3877632     #>  6 UniProtKB P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0005102 PMID:3877632     #>  7 UniProtKB Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0045087 PMID:11606775|P… #>  8 UniProtKB P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0006977 PMID:3460971     #>  9 UniProtKB P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0003700 PMID:3460971     #> 10 UniProtKB O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0045087 PMID:9813127     #> # ℹ 14 more variables: evidence_code <chr>, with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, #> #   ro_predicate <chr>, db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, #> #   db_object_type <chr>, taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, assigned_by <chr>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>

title: Filter to interacting-taxon annotations — gaf_interspecies
text: Returns rows second (interacting) taxon present column 13 — .e., host-pathogen annotations human gene products annotated context SARS-CoV-2, HIV-1, bacterial infection. excluded standard enrichment workflows may specific interest immunology infectious disease research.

title: Filter to interacting-taxon annotations — gaf_interspecies
code: gaf_interspecies(gaf)

title: Filter to interacting-taxon annotations — gaf_interspecies
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Filter to interacting-taxon annotations — gaf_interspecies
text: tibble, subset gaf.

title: Filter to interacting-taxon annotations — gaf_interspecies
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf_interspecies(gaf) #> # A tibble: 1 × 20 #>   db    db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id db_reference evidence_code #>   <chr> <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr> <chr>        <chr>         #> 1 UniP… Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0… PMID:116067… IMP           #> # ℹ 13 more variables: with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, ro_predicate <chr>, #> #   db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, db_object_type <chr>, #> #   taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, #> #   assigned_by <chr>, annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>

what: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
title: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
text: Returns data frame species EBI GOA distributes named species-specific GAF file, resolved download URLs primary NCBI taxon IDs.

title: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
code: gaf_known_species()

title: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
text: data frame columns species, directory, filename, taxon_id, url.

title: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
text: -species UniProt file (UNIPROT/goa_uniprot_all.gaf.gz, ~5 GB) PDB file included species-specific; supply URLs directly gaf_cache. URL table stale (EBI occasionally renames files), use gaf_cache(species, gaf_file = "new_name.gaf.gz") gaf_cache(url = "https://...").

title: List species with known GAF download URLs — gaf_known_species
code: gaf_known_species() #>        species   directory           filename taxon_id #> 1  arabidopsis ARABIDOPSIS        tair.gaf.gz     3702 #> 2      chicken     CHICKEN goa_chicken.gaf.gz     9031 #> 3          cow         COW     goa_cow.gaf.gz     9913 #> 4        dicty       DICTY   dictybase.gaf.gz    44689 #> 5          dog         DOG     goa_dog.gaf.gz     9615 #> 6          fly         FLY          fb.gaf.gz     7227 #> 7        human       HUMAN   goa_human.gaf.gz     9606 #> 8        mouse       MOUSE         mgi.gaf.gz    10090 #> 9          pig         PIG     goa_pig.gaf.gz     9823 #> 10         rat         RAT         rgd.gaf.gz    10116 #> 11        worm        WORM          wb.gaf.gz     6239 #> 12       yeast       YEAST   goa_yeast.gaf.gz   559292 #> 13   zebrafish   ZEBRAFISH        zfin.gaf.gz     7955 #>                                                                      url #> 1     https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/ARABIDOPSIS/tair.gaf.gz #> 2  https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/CHICKEN/goa_chicken.gaf.gz #> 3          https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/COW/goa_cow.gaf.gz #> 4      https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/DICTY/dictybase.gaf.gz #> 5          https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/DOG/goa_dog.gaf.gz #> 6               https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/FLY/fb.gaf.gz #> 7      https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/HUMAN/goa_human.gaf.gz #> 8            https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/MOUSE/mgi.gaf.gz #> 9          https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/PIG/goa_pig.gaf.gz #> 10             https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/RAT/rgd.gaf.gz #> 11             https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/WORM/wb.gaf.gz #> 12     https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/YEAST/goa_yeast.gaf.gz #> 13      https://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/pub/databases/GO/goa/ZEBRAFISH/zfin.gaf.gz

what: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
text: Transforms output parse_gaf column structure semsql term_association table, suitable writing parquet loading GO.ddb-compatible DuckDB connection.

title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
code: gaf_to_term_association(gaf)

title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
text: gaf tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
text: tibble semsql term_association column order, ready arrow::write_parquet() DuckDB ingestion.

title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
text: mapping : Additionally retains taxon_subject, taxon_interactor, db_object_symbol, db_object_type extended columns minimal semsql schema useful downstream analysis.

title: Convert a parsed GAF tibble to semsql term_association format — gaf_to_term_association
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf_to_term_association(gaf) #> # A tibble: 9 × 14 #>   subject          predicate  object     evidence_type publication source symbol #>   <chr>            <chr>      <chr>      <chr>         <chr>       <chr>  <chr>  #> 1 UniProtKB:P05231 RO:0002331 GO:0006954 IDA           PMID:21268… UniPr… IL6    #> 2 UniProtKB:P05231 RO:0002327 GO:0005125 IDA           PMID:21268… UniPr… IL6    #> 3 UniProtKB:P05231 RO:0001025 GO:0005615 IDA           PMID:21268… UniPr… IL6    #> 4 UniProtKB:P01375 RO:0002331 GO:0006954 IEA           PMID:38776… UniPr… TNF    #> 5 UniProtKB:P01375 RO:0002327 GO:0005102 IPI           PMID:38776… UniPr… TNF    #> 6 UniProtKB:Q9Y6K5 RO:0002331 GO:0045087 IMP           PMID:11606… UniPr… IRAK4  #> 7 UniProtKB:P04637 RO:0002331 GO:0006977 IDA           PMID:34609… UniPr… TP53   #> 8 UniProtKB:P04637 RO:0002327 GO:0003700 IDA           PMID:34609… UniPr… TP53   #> 9 UniProtKB:O00206 RO:0002331 GO:0045087 IDA           PMID:98131… UniPr… TLR4   #> # ℹ 7 more variables: db_object_type <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, qualifier <chr>, date <date>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>

what: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
title: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
text: Convenience wrapper combining gaf_cache parse_gaf.

title: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
code: get_gaf(species, ..., force = FALSE)

title: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
text: species character scalar, e.g. "human", "mouse". ... additional arguments passed parse_gaf, e.g. filter_not, evidence_codes, filter_taxon. force logical passed gaf_cache.

title: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
text: tibble returned parse_gaf.

title: Parse a species GAF file in one step — get_gaf
code: gaf <- get_gaf("human", filter_taxon = 9606L,                evidence_codes = GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL) #> Using cached GAF: /Users/vincentcarey/Library/Caches/org.R-project.R/R/BiocFileCache/d6e436535dcd_goa_human.gaf.gz gaf #> # A tibble: 423,057 × 20 #>    db        db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier       go_id    db_reference #>    <chr>     <chr>        <chr>            <chr>           <chr>    <chr>        #>  1 UniProtKB A0A024RBG1   NUDT4B           enables         GO:0005… PMID:339617… #>  2 UniProtKB A0A075B6N1   TRBV19           part_of         GO:0042… PMID:210819… #>  3 UniProtKB A0A075B6T8   TRAV9-1          involved_in     GO:0002… PMID:167993… #>  4 UniProtKB A0A075B6T8   TRAV9-1          is_active_in    GO:0019… PMID:167993… #>  5 UniProtKB A0A087WT01   TRAV27           enables         GO:0005… PMID:210819… #>  6 UniProtKB A0A087WT01   TRAV27           involved_in     GO:0006… PMID:126822… #>  7 UniProtKB A0A087WT01   TRAV27           involved_in     GO:0050… PMID:126822… #>  8 UniProtKB A0A087WT01   TRAV27           part_of         GO:0042… PMID:210819… #>  9 UniProtKB A0A087X1C5   CYP2D7           NOT|enables     GO:0070… PMID:188385… #> 10 UniProtKB A0A087X1C5   CYP2D7           NOT|involved_in GO:0006… PMID:188385… #> # ℹ 423,047 more rows #> # ℹ 14 more variables: evidence_code <chr>, with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, #> #   ro_predicate <chr>, db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, #> #   db_object_type <chr>, taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, #> #   taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, assigned_by <chr>, #> #   annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>

what: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
text: Reads GAF (Gene Association Format) file — plain gzip-compressed — returns tibble one row per annotation.  GAF 2.1 2.2 supported.  optional columns 16 (annotation_extension) 17 (gene_product_form_id) included present.

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
code: parse_gaf(path, filter_not = TRUE, filter_taxon = NULL, evidence_codes = NULL)

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
text: path character scalar.  Path GAF file (.gaf, .gaf.gz, readable connection). filter_not logical.  TRUE (default), rows qualifier "" excluded.  annotations assert gene product explicitly involved GO term usually excluded enrichment analyses. filter_taxon integer NULL.  non-NULL, rows whose primary taxon matches NCBI taxon ID returned. Default NULL retains taxa. evidence_codes character vector NULL.  non-NULL, rows whose evidence_code vector returned. See GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL GAF_EVIDENCE_COMPUTATIONAL curated sets. Default NULL retains evidence codes.

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
text: tibble 20 columns described .

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
text: db Source database, e.g. "UniProtKB" db_object_id Accession source db, e.g. "P12345" db_object_symbol Gene symbol, e.g. "IL6" qualifier Annotation qualifier: NA, "", "contributes_to", "colocalizes_with" go_id GO CURIE, e.g. "GO:0006954" db_reference Pipe-separated references, e.g. "PMID:12345678|PMID:23456789" evidence_code GAF evidence code, e.g. "IEA" with_or_from Pipe-separated supporting identifiers; NA absent aspect Single character: "P" (BP), "F" (MF), "C" (CC) db_object_name Full name annotated entity db_object_synonym Pipe-separated synonyms; NA absent db_object_type Entity type, e.g. "protein" taxon Raw taxon field, e.g. "taxon:9606" "taxon:9606|taxon:562" interacting-taxon annotations taxon_subject Primary taxon NCBI ID integer, e.g. 9606L taxon_interactor Interacting organism NCBI ID, NA single-taxon annotations date Annotation date Date assigned_by Database created annotation annotation_extension Optional RO-based annotation extensions; NA absent gene_product_form_id Optional isoform identifier; NA absent ro_predicate RO predicate CURIE derived aspect: "RO:0002331" (BP/involved_in), "RO:0002327" (MF/enables), "RO:0001025" (CC/located_in). See GAF_ASPECT_TO_RO full mapping rationale.

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
text: Several columns contain pipe-separated multi-value fields: db_reference, with_or_from, db_object_synonym, annotation_extension.  retained character strings returned tibble.  Use gaf_expand_column unnest specific column long format.

title: Parse a GAF 2.x annotation file into a tibble — parse_gaf
code: gaf_path <- system.file("extdata", "mini.gaf.gz", package = "GOAnno4Bioc") gaf <- parse_gaf(gaf_path) gaf #> # A tibble: 9 × 20 #>   db    db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id db_reference evidence_code #>   <chr> <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr> <chr>        <chr>         #> 1 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:212685… IDA           #> 2 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 3 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 4 UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 IEA           #> 5 UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 IPI           #> 6 UniP… Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0… PMID:116067… IMP           #> 7 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 8 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 9 UniP… O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0… PMID:9813127 IDA           #> # ℹ 13 more variables: with_or_from <chr>, aspect <chr>, ro_predicate <chr>, #> #   db_object_name <chr>, db_object_synonym <chr>, db_object_type <chr>, #> #   taxon <chr>, taxon_subject <int>, taxon_interactor <int>, date <date>, #> #   assigned_by <chr>, annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>  # Experimental evidence only parse_gaf(gaf_path, evidence_codes = GAF_EVIDENCE_EXPERIMENTAL) #> # A tibble: 8 × 20 #>   db    db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id db_reference evidence_code #>   <chr> <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr> <chr>        <chr>         #> 1 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:212685… IDA           #> 2 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 3 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 4 UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 IPI           #> 5 UniP… Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0… PMID:116067… IMP           #> 6 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 7 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 8 UniP… O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0… PMID:9813127 IDA           #> #   assigned_by <chr>, annotation_extension <chr>, gene_product_form_id <chr>  # Human annotations only parse_gaf(gaf_path, filter_taxon = 9606L) #> # A tibble: 9 × 20 #>   db    db_object_id db_object_symbol qualifier go_id db_reference evidence_code #>   <chr> <chr>        <chr>            <chr>     <chr> <chr>        <chr>         #> 1 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:212685… IDA           #> 2 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 3 UniP… P05231       IL6              NA        GO:0… PMID:2126852 IDA           #> 4 UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 IEA           #> 5 UniP… P01375       TNF              NA        GO:0… PMID:3877632 IPI           #> 6 UniP… Q9Y6K5       IRAK4            NA        GO:0… PMID:116067… IMP           #> 7 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 8 UniP… P04637       TP53             NA        GO:0… PMID:3460971 IDA           #> 9 UniP… O00206       TLR4             NA        GO:0… PMID:9813127 IDA           #> #
